Alright, so we're going to welcome Layla onto the screen and she's going to do a close. So we're going to do the one to ten close, which is a really famous, famous close, but it's, it's a common close that's used a lot, especially in personal training, which is high in packages. So Layla is going to be the lady who needs to think about it and I'm going to go with the one to ten close. Okay? So. I just think I need to think about it. Okay, totally understand. On a scale from one to ten, one being you want to drink beer, eat pizza all day and like game wait for those to your life, have diabetes and like die early. And ten being, you know, this is a huge party for you in your life and you want to take action today and actually like change your life, change your body. Where are you? So you're like a 7.5? 7.5. Okay, awesome. So what's that? Like why is it a 7.5 instead of a 2? I'm just sick of feeling this way. Like I'm sick of not being able to fit in my clothes and knowing I should be doing something about it and not doing something about it. Got it. And then your kids? Two. Okay. You know, being a good role model for them would that be something that feeds into the 7.5? Yeah. I don't want them to go through what I went through when I was a kid. Awesome. That's a great reason. You know, if you have more energy, you're less likely to be upset with someone. If you're having a good day, just work now, having that buzz, like that like could have long-term impacts on your marriage and your relationship. Would that be something that would also feed into that 7.5? Yeah. Awesome. So it seems like you have a lot of really good reasons. So what stops it from being a 10? Like why is it a 7.5 instead of a 10? Because all those reasons sound great. Like so what, why is it a 10? I guess I just feel like all of that is, you know, more important than me doing this. Okay, got it. Now what if doing this, health, you know, being healthy, like you've heard the expression, you have to take, you know, the airplane mask and put yours on before you can help anyone else, right? I said, I know you're a super mom, you're doing all this stuff, you're running around, you got the kids, you're making a lot, you know, making dinner, making a lot of your buying groceries, doing all that stuff, driving a sign of practice, dropping off, whatever, right? You got all this stuff that's going on. What if doing this one thing for you was putting the mask on first and then would allow you to be a better wife, be a better mom, you know, be there for your kids, set the role model example that you want and then honestly just live a better life and finally fit in the dress that you're looking for and feeling secure and feeling confident for your husband the way that you said you wanted to. Like wouldn't that make it a 10? Yeah, I guess it would. Alright, well if it's a 10 out of 10, then that's a super important priority. So let's do it. That's how you do the one out of 10 clothes. Okay. Thank you so much for Leila. And the second clothes I want to talk to you about is, I call this the unicorn clothes, I've never heard this anywhere else. But I love this clothes, I think it's hilarious. And so you're like, okay, so let me get this straight. So you need to think about it, totally understand. So if this program was the most amazing program you've ever seen in your entire life, right? So I mean, like, you've got, like, you've got, like, what else do you need, right? Like what kind of unicorn program are you looking for? Because like, like, you need nutrition, right? You need a meal plan, we got that covered. You need a cookbook, we got that covered. You need to know how to make the food, we got that covered. You know how to buy the food, we got that covered. Save your time and money while you do it with the grocery list. Alright? You need to train with you three days a week, we got that covered. Like what other kind of unicorn program are you looking for that we don't have right now? What are we missing? What are we missing? Because I just got to know. Alright? Now most of the time they won't be able to come up with anything. I'm like, alright. So like, if you don't have any reason not to do this program, because this program has everything that you need to help you sort, like, reach your goals, then like, right now the only thing that's getting the way of you reaching your goals is you. So like, let's do this. Like, let's take that first step. Like, if you don't take the first step, you're never going to lose weight. It's always going to be this thing where you're like, knock on the door and run away. Knock on the door and run away. Right here, standing like open arms, door open, like, let's get you the way you want to be. Alright, I call it the unicorn close because I think it's funny when people laugh when you say unicorn. But it's like, what kind of unicorn program are you looking for? Right? And then one of my other favorite closes is, you need to think about it. Totally understand. Well, let's consider the options. Alright, so let's call the let's consider the options close, which you can, this kind of works for stall and the money, but it works really well with money too. So with, let's consider the options you like, listen, so if you leave here today, you don't do this program, then you still want to lose weight, right? Okay, so let's look at the other things that are out there. You can buy personal training, which for six weeks will probably cost you about 1500 bucks on the low end, maybe a grand. And you have no chance of getting your money back and you're going to get it from a guy who's probably not that experienced in a big box gym. They won't still make you a meal plan. You'll have no group of accountability. You have no cookbook, no grocery list. None of that, you'll just have three cents a week with a trainer, which means you're probably going to lose weight. You'll just be out a whole bunch of money. So that's probably not going to be a good option if you're trying to lose weight, right? Option two is you could do any of the diet only interventions. You could do weight washers, you could do Jenny Craig, you could do any of the stuff that we've already tried, but you already know how that goes, right? Like you're going to spend a bunch of money, you'll lose some weight, but then you'll gain it back. So it's like really just paying money to be 10 pounds heavier six months a month. You want that? No. Okay. So that option is not going to work. Then you could do LA fitness and just pay your $29 a month and not go because you already said you don't go anyways. But let's just magically assume that you do go because you get really motivated all of a sudden, which doesn't make sense, but let's just go with that. Well you still don't have the food, you still don't have the cookbook, you still don't have any of the nutrition, which means that you're going to go there and probably fall off because you're not seeing any results. And you don't even know what you're doing there because you have no trainer, right? Okay. So like, I mean, on the other hand, you could just set up for a normal membership at like maybe a more boutique studio like CrossFit or boot camp or whatever, but you're still over a six week period, probably going to still be looking at 300 bucks, except you don't have the option to weigh back and you're still not going to get any of the other value as that we already have to help you cross the finish line and motivate you, which is what you said was the normal problem that you had, right? So what all you got? Like if you want to take like right now I'm standing in front of you with the opportunity to actually help you lose weight and actually stop trying to lose weight and actually start losing weight. So you want to do this? Let's do it. And then that's, that's let's consider the options because you just paint them into a corner like, listen, if you're trying to lose weight, none of these others in there are going to work other than ours. So like, let's do it. Um, that's one of my favorite closes. And then, um, the last one is I really need to think about it. And then, um, there's two ways of saying it, like listen, sir, totally understand, but thought is instantaneous. And so when we're making this is like, you know, you can say like, ah, let's think about a purple monkey, whatever it's instantaneous. And so so is making decision. We just need to decide we to confront what it is because the amount of time that'll take you to make the decision two days from now and the time that I'll make a decision right now, we'll take the exact same amount of time more likely in the future. Um, you're not going to sit at like sit there and your rocking chair staring at the wall like, hmm, I wonder if I'm going to do that weight loss challenge that I was going to sign up for. Hmm, of course not. You're going to get out of here. Your phone's going to ring. You know, you got to pick up kids from soccer practice. You got to go drop some dry cleaning off. You got to go get groceries. You got to cook food. You got to clean the house. You got to go to your job. You got to like, there's all these things that are going to happen afterwards and you're probably not going to think of us too much. I am heartbroken that you're talking to me thinking about me all the time, but that being said, that's reality. That's what we live in. So what really happens that if you think about it, it really means that you're actively deciding to delay the decision, which means that it's very, very unlikely that it's going to happen. Okay. Is that true? And so most of the times when I delay decisions because I, I don't like, and then you can do the triplet, you can close real life. I don't like the product. I don't like the person or I think it's too much money. So which one of those things you could use that or you'd be like, um, so like we just need to confront the issue, right? Cause thinking is instantaneous. And so like you're not going to do that. So like let's just decide right now whether you're going to do it or not. And either way you're making a decision. So either making a decision to be healthy, because whatever decision you make, you're always either moving towards your goals or away from them. And right now you can either choose to move away from your goals by not actively making a decision to lose weight and potentially obviously get your money back and have an awesome experience, which all these bajillions of testimonials have already shown you. Or you can choose to do it and crush it. And so that's the thinking is instantaneous close. The thing is you can see how you layer different clothes on top of each other because they're all just lines of reasoning and they lead into one another. Okay. So that concludes the closing sequence. This is kind of like the Missy and Lanias, the Unicorn clothes, the instantaneous clothes and let's consider the options closer. Some of my other favorites that, you know, that like, I guess they kind of fall between stall clothes and money clothes, but either way, hopefully this gives you all of the tools you need in your arsenal to overcome everyone's objections and sign everyone up so that they can actually take control of their health and lose the weight and be healthy. All right. Awesome. Thank you so much. You guys are the reason all these people are going to be healthy and successful. If you don't help them take the first step, they never will. All right. So that's our duty to humanity is to help them across the start line to get going. All right. Thanks so much. And I'm really excited and we will talk soon.
